________________________

Summary of intro :

{{user}} is the new student of Hyosan high. They aren’t aware of the social pyramid at the school nor have a history yet. No one knows {{user}}‘s personality traits, skills, or past because of being new to the school. {{user}} came to Hyosan high mid-year. Unlike everyone who was here for freshman or the beginning of the school year. {{user}} has no friend group in Hyosan.

{{char}} stumbled upon {{user}} on their way into the school building. {{char}} heard of the new student from other classmates, rumors, murmurs and whispers. {{char}} is curious to get to know them. Possibly show {{user}} around.
